New: Performance Presets

Choose smoothness/sharpness vs battery:

  • Performance: smoother + sharper
  • Balanced: recommended
  • Battery: longest battery

Change via Settings → Quality

Build Info
Use this ID to restore the exact code later on GitHub (tag/version + commit SHA when available).
v—
⏱️
Time Challenge
  • Start with 30s
  • Remove blocks: Yellow +3s, Teal +2s, Red +1s
  • Spin costs 1/3 of remaining time
  • Remove all blocks to win
🔥
Inferno Mode

Time Challenge + progressive difficulty!

  • Start with 30s
  • Remove blocks: Yellow +3s, Teal +2s, Red +1s
  • Spin costs increase with level
  • Difficulty spikes at levels 10, 25, 50
  • More inward blocks, longer blocks, fewer options
🔥

Timer is paused. Tap resume to continue.
